testsuite.name: com.example.UserControllerTest
testsuite.testcase: <failure message="expected:<404> but was:<200>" type="java.lang.AssertionError"> java.lang.AssertionError: expected:<404> but was:<200> at com.example.UserControllerTest.shouldReturnNotFound(UserControllerTest.java:42)

testcase.name: shouldHandleError
testcase.error: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "String.length()" because "str" is null at com.example.UserControllerTest.shouldHandleError(UserControllerTest.java:50)
